summary: The diff implements a red-orange gradient theme across the frontend UI and adds a Panel Links section to the home page. REQ-1 is largely satisfied with bg-brand-gradient classes applied to headers, sidebar, buttons, and other UI elements. REQ-2 is satisfied with a Panel Links section added to HomePage.tsx. However, TournamentsPage.tsx still contains a 'completed' status badge using blue colors, which may violate the 'no blue accent colors' requirement. Neon/rainbow multi-color styles were added to the Terms page beyond what was requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: No blue or purple accent colors remain in either panel
missing_requirements.reason: TournamentsPage.tsx still contains a 'completed' status badge styled with 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 border border-blue-200', which is a blue accent color that should have been replaced with the red-orange scheme.

hallucinated_features.description: Neon and rainbow multi-color heading styles for the Terms page including cyan, pink, purple, and lime neon colors
hallucinated_features.reason: The index.css and TermsPage.tsx implement neon-colored heading variants with cyan, pink, purple, and lime colors that were not requested. The build request only asked for a red-orange theme across the UI.
